"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\debloat-helper.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\debloat-helper.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\debloat-helper.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -mconsole -municode -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\debloat-helper.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o debloat-helper.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdebloat-helper.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\debloat-helper.dir\linkLibs.rsp
